UI_trait_motionsicknessdesc:
You gain sickness while driving.
The amount of sickness gained depends on vehicle's speed.
UI_trait_mundanedesc:
Your weapon attacks will never critically hit.
This includes any critical bonuses from traits such as Prowess.
Any other damage bonuses still apply properly.
UI_trait_mushroompickerdesc: Increases chance to find mushrooms in Search mode.
UI_trait_naturaldesc: You've never liked all the preservatives in foods, opting instead for natural foods.
UI_trait_nightowldesc:
Requires little sleep.
Stays extra alert when sleeping.
(+40% tiredness recovery rate when sleeping. BUT does not affect sleep time, so the character will stay asleep after reaching 0 tiredness.
Needs to set an alarm every night to take full advantage of the trait.)
UI_trait_ninjawaydesc:
Increases endurance recovery while sneaking.
(More effective if staying still or running while sneaking.)
UI_trait_noodlelegsdesc:
You constantly tripped when going out for morning jogs.
Chance to trip when running and sprinting.
Chance decreases based on your sprinting and nimble level.
UI_trait_noxpaxedesc:
You chopped some trees from time to time.
+2 Axe
+1 Carpentry
You do not gain XP multiplier by this trait.
The bonus Axe and Carpentry level does not show in character creation menu.
UI_trait_noxpfirstaiddesc:
You took first aid lessons to hopefully save someone else's life.
+3 First Aid
You do not gain XP multiplier by this trait.
The bonus First Aid level does not show in character creation menu.
UI_trait_noxpmaintenancedesc:
You took maintenance lessons to make your tools last longer.
+2 Maintenance
You do not gain XP multiplier by this trait.
The bonus Maintenance level does not show in character creation menu.
UI_trait_noxpshooterdesc:
You went out to the shooting range during your free time.
+2 Aiming
You do not gain XP multiplier by this trait.
The bonus Aiming level does not show in character creation menu.
UI_trait_noxpsneakydesc:
You were a champion in hide and seek while playing with your friends.
+2 Sneaking
+1 Lightfooted
You do not gain XP multiplier by this trait.
The bonus Sneaking and Lightfooted level does not show in character creation menu.
UI_trait_noxptechniciandesc:
You took interest in technical things throughout your life.
+1 Mechanics
+2 Electrical
You do not gain XP multiplier by this trait.
The bonus Mechanics and Electrical level does not show in character creation menu.
UI_trait_nutritionistdesc:
Can see the nutritional values of any food.
(Including non-packaged food and cooked food.)
UI_trait_obeseDesc2:
Very low running speed, very low endurance and prone to injury.
Starts with 105 weight and Slow Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_obesedesc:
Reduced running speed, very low endurance and prone to injury.
(Starting weight is 105.
Replaced by Overweight if weight goes below 100.
+20% chance to trip while run/sprint vaulting a low fence.
-10% chance to trip from getting attacked by lunging zombies.
Increased chance of falling when bumping into a zombie or survivor.
Greatly increased chance to fail a tall fence climb.
-60% endurance regeneration.
+40% fall damage, and increased chance of fracture/deep wound from falling.
Cannot gain Fitness XP above level 6.)
UI_trait_olympiandesc: You are or were at one point an Olympic competer whose fitness and speed are a reflection of that.
UI_trait_optimisticdesc:
Less bored. May not be depressed for a long time.
(-50% passive boredom generation.
Maximum Unhappiness level cannot exceed 50% for 48 hours.)
UI_trait_optimistmooddesc:
Less bored. May not be depressed for a long time.
(-50% passive boredom generation.
Maximum Unhappiness level cannot exceed 50% for 48 hours.)
UI_trait_outdoorsmandesc:
Not affected by harsh weather conditions.
-90% chance of catching a cold.
-50% or -63% chance of getting scratched/lacerated while walking or running through trees.
Lights fires ~100% faster.
-33% chance of breaking fire kindling.
UI_trait_outofshapedesc:
Low endurance, low endurance regeneration.
(Can be lost by training Fitness to level 5.
Trait becomes Unfit is Fitness goes below level 3.
Gained if Fitness goes below level 5.)
UI_trait_overweightDesc2:
Low running speed, low endurance and prone to injury.
Starts with 95 weight and Slow Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_overweightdesc:
Reduced running speed, very low endurance and prone to injury.
(Starting weight is 95.
Replaced by Obese if weight goes above 100.
Lost if weight goes below 85.
+10% chance to trip while run/sprint vaulting a low fence.
-5% chance to trip from getting attacked by lunging zombies.
Slightly increased chance of falling when bumping into a zombie or survivor.
Increased chance to fail a tall fence climb.
-30% endurance regeneration.
+20% fall damage. and slightly increased chance of fracture/deep wound from falling.)
-1% running/sprinting speed.
Cannot gain Fitness XP towards level 10.
UI_trait_owlpersondesc:
Prefers to stay awake in the evenings.
(Fatigue gains more slowly in the evening (05:00 p.m. - 10:00 p.m.),
but faster in the morning (05:00 a.m. - 10:00 a.m.)).
UI_trait_packmousedesc:
You always travel light.
Reduced maximum carrying capacity.
UI_trait_packmuledesc:
You're careful to pack everything you need.
Your maximum carrying capacity is increased.
Strength is more impactful on your carrying capacity.
UI_trait_panicattacksdesc:
Suffers from sudden panic attacks.
Panic passes slower.
(May wake up from a panic attack.
Panic attacks become less frequent with survived time.)
UI_trait_paranoiadesc:
Periodically, you will get a false scare and panic.
You will need to actively find ways to reduce your stress - it only gets worse after a paranoia attack.
UI_trait_poordriverdesc:
You have limited experience with vehicles.
Vehicles move slowly, make more noise, and handle less efficiently.
UI_trait_preparedammodesc:
You were prepared and stocked-up on ammunition before civilization fell.
You begin the game with a modest amount of various types of ammunition in your inventory.
UI_trait_preparedcampdesc:
Before shit hit the fan, you pulled together some camping supplies.
You begin the game with camping supplies.
UI_trait_preparedcardesc:
You were prepared for the apocalypse and knew you'd need a reliable vehicle.
You begin the game with some car maintenance supplies.
UI_trait_preparedcoordinationdesc:
You took a tourist trip to Kentucky few days prior, and took all the items needed for it.
You begin the game with all maps of major cities, a pencil and a digital watch.
UI_trait_preparedfooddesc:
You were prepared and stocked-up on food before civilization fell.
You begin the game with a stock of food in your inventory.
UI_trait_preparedmedicaldesc:
You were prepared and stocked-up on medical supplies before civilization fell.
You begin the game with a stock of medical supplies in your inventory.
UI_trait_preparedpackdesc:
You were prepared for the inevitable looting that would occur following the apocalypse.
You begin the game with a Regular Hiking Bag.
UI_trait_preparedrepairdesc:
You were prepared and stocked-up on construction supplies before civilization fell.
You begin the game with a stock of construction supplies in your inventory.
UI_trait_preparedweapondesc:
You were prepared and stocked-up on weapons before civilization fell.
You begin the game with a stock of low-level weapons in your inventory.
UI_trait_priestspiritdesc:
Can write prayers to improve mental state.
(Prayers slightly reduce stress, boredom and unhappiness.)
UI_trait_probladedesc:
You are especially good at wielding Blade weapons.
While wielding these types of weapons, they degrade more slowly, deal 20% more damage,
and have a higher critical chance, which increases based on your skill.
UI_trait_probluntdesc:
You are especially good at wielding Blunt weapons.
While wielding these types of weapons, they degrade more slowly, deal 20% more damage,
and have a higher critical chance, which increases based on your skill.
UI_trait_progundesc:
You are especially good at wielding firearms.
While wielding these types of weapons, they degrade more slowly, and (optionally, sandbox setting) have a chance to not consume ammunition when fired.
Chance is based on your skill level.
UI_trait_pronetoillness2desc:
More prone to disease. May accidentally catch a cold.
Faster rate of zombification.
(+25% zombification speed, +70% chance of catching a cold,
+20% cold strength, +50% cold progression speed,
has a negligible chance of catching a cold while outside.)
UI_trait_pronetoillnessDesc2:
More prone to disease. May accidentally catch a cold.
Faster rate of zombification.
(+25% zombification speed, +70% chance of catching a cold,
+20% cold strength, +50% cold progression speed,
has a negligible chance of catching a cold while outside.)
UI_trait_pronetoillnessdesc:
More prone to disease. Faster rate of zombification.
(+25% zombification speed, +70% chance of catching a cold,
+20% cold strength, +50% cold progression speed.)
UI_trait_prospeardesc:
You are especially good at wielding Spear weapons.
While wielding these types of weapons, they degrade more slowly, deal 20% more damage,
and have a higher critical chance, which increases based on your skill.
UI_trait_quickrestdesc:
Your endurance recovery while sitting is doubled.
You are informed if your endurance is max while sitting.
UI_trait_quickworkerdesc:
You have a penchant for expedience in all things.
Your timed actions (such as sawing logs, crafting items, or disassembling furniture) are considerably faster.
UI_trait_quietdesc: You used to startle your friends and co-workers. Now that innate stealth is paying off.
UI_trait_refuellerdesc:
Transfers inventory items, refuels vehicles and drains gasoline faster.
(-25% inventory transferring time, refueling vehicles and draining gasoline.
Up to -60% inventory transferring time with "Dextrous" trait.)
UI_trait_relentlessdesc:
Can recover endurance when swinging a weapon.
(Has a chance to restore half of the weapon's base swing cost.)
UI_trait_relentlessscavengerdesc:
Always focused on foraging and scavenging, no matter the circumstances.
Remains aware of his surroundings while scavenging.
( No Search Mode interruptions & no overlay effects. )
UI_trait_resilientdesc:
Less prone to disease. Slower rate of zombification.
(-25% zombification speed, -55% chance of catching a cold,
-20% cold strength, and -50% cold progression speed.)
UI_trait_restfulsleeperdesc:
Fast gain of energy while sleeping.
Suffers no penalties from sleeping on bad furniture or on the ground.
Automatically wakes up when fully rested.
UI_trait_scrapperdesc:
You're good at taking things apart.
Allows you to craft metal sheets and pipes.
UI_trait_scroungerdesc:
You're careful to search every nook and cranny.
You tend to find more items while searching containers.
+1 Scavenging if Scavenging Skill mod enabled
UI_trait_secondwindcooldown: *Second Wind Is No Longer In Cooldown*
UI_trait_secondwinddesc:
You know to push your body to its limits when heading towards danger.
If there are 3 zombies near you while you're exhausted or very tired, gain full endurance and restore fatigue.
Second Wind has a cooldown of 14 days, however it is halved if it didn't recover any fatigue.
UI_trait_selfdestructivedesc:
When the going gets tough, you crumble.
While sad, your health begins to decline down to a maximum relative to your unhappiness level.
UI_trait_sensitivedigestiondesc:
Experiences stomach discomfort, pain, and nausea when overeating.
(The higher the fullness, the stronger the discomfort, pain, and nausea.)
UI_trait_shooter2desc: Has skills in Aiming and Reloading.
UI_trait_shortsighdesc: Smaller (same) view distance. Slower visibility fade (50% slower).
UI_trait_slowmetabolismdesc:
Prone to gain weight.
Trains Strength faster, but Fitness slower.
(-30% calorie burn if weight is less than 90,
+30% Strength XP, -30% Fitness XP.)
UI_trait_slowworkerdesc:
Whether because you're lazy or just like to double-check your work, you tend to take longer getting things done.
You perform timed actions (such as sawing logs, crafting items, or disassembling furniture) much more slowly.
UI_trait_snorerdesc: Snores loudly during sleep, attracting unwanted attention.
UI_trait_soalcoholicdesc:
Has an alcohol addiction.
Abstaining from alcohol increases boredom, unhappiness, and thirst.
Prolonged abstinence increases fatigue, stress, headache, and nausea.
Alcohol's effect on drowsiness is reduced.
UI_trait_sorelegsdesc:
Experiences pain in the legs when walking, running, sprinting, doing fitness and stomping.
While sprinting, the pain and endurance consumption is much higher.
(Sprinting level reduces pain while running and sprinting.
Lightfooted level reduces walking and stomping pain.)
UI_trait_specaiddesc:
You are specialized with First Aid.
Your dedication to this specialization limits your access to other skills.
You receive 25% XP from all other sources.
Has access to several unique recipes which allow the
improvisation of many medical items.
UI_trait_speccraftingdesc:
You are specialized in all things crafting.
Your dedication to this specialization limits your access to other skills.
You receive 25% XP from all other sources.
UI_trait_specfooddesc:
You are specialized in the Kitchen, the Farm. and the Outdoors.
Your dedication to this specialization limits your access to other skills.
You receive 25% XP from all other sources.
UI_trait_specgunsdesc:
You are specialized with the use of all firearms.
Your dedication to this specialization limits your access to other skills.
You receive 25% XP from all other sources.
UI_trait_specmovedesc:
You are specialized with movement.
Your dedication to this specialization limits your access to other skills.
You receive 25% XP from all other sources.
UI_trait_specweaponsdesc:
You are specialized with the use of all melee weapons.
Your dedication to this specialization limits your access to other skills.
You receive 25% XP from all other sources.
UI_trait_stoutdesc:
Extra knockback from melee weapons and increased carry weight.
(Can be gained by training Strength to level 6.
Replaced by Strong when reaching level 9 Strength.
Lost if Strength is below 6.)
UI_trait_strongbackdesc:
Increases carry weight.
(Plus 1-2 carry weight depending on Strength level.)
UI_trait_strongdesc:
Extra knockback from melee weapons and increased carry weight.
(+40% melee damage.
Can be gained by training Strength to level 9.
Lost if Strength is below level 9.)
UI_trait_stronggripdesc:
Heavy weapons consume less endurance when swinging.
(affects weapons with heavy attacks, changing their increased stamina consumption to the base)
UI_trait_superimmunedesc:
You have an exceptionally strong immune system.
Your wounds can never become infected.
You are completely immune to death by Zombification, however it will take weeks to fully recover from the virus.
UI_trait_tavernbrawlerdesc:
You are more effective at using whatever is available to you as a weapon.
Improvised weapons (such as, but not limited to: Spoons, Forks, Pool Cues, or Frying Pans) are slightly more effective and much less likely to break.
Please note that improvised weapons will never be a good alternative to proper weapons, but this trait makes them more usable as a stopgap.
UI_trait_terminatordesc:
You're all man, no machine, but with firearm in hand, you may as well be a killing machine. Hasta la vista, baby.
25% extra damage from guns.
Doubled aiming speed, increased range, decreased panic and stress when holding a gun.
+3 Aiming, +2 Reloading, +1 Nimble.
You do not gain XP multiplier by this trait. The bonus levels do not show in character creation menu.
UI_trait_thickblooddesc:
Wounds bleeds less.
(-50% damage from bleeding.)
UI_trait_thickskinneddesc:
Less chance of scratches or bites breaking the skin.
(+30% chance of not being injured by zombies.
-54% chance of getting scratched/cut by trees.)
UI_trait_tinkererdesc: You have a habit of tinkering with things.
UI_trait_tirelessdesc:
Has a small chance to partially recover endurance after a successful weapon attack.
Muscle strain recovers faster.
UI_trait_underweightDesc2:
Low combat effectiveness, low endurance and prone to injury.
Starts with 70 weight and Fast Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_underweightdesc:
Low strength, low endurance and prone to injury.
(Starting weight is 70.
Replaced by Very Underweight if weight goes below 65.
Lost if weight goes above 75.
-20% melee damage.
+10% chance to trip while run/sprint vaulting a low fence or getting attacked by lunging zombies.
Slightly increased chance of falling when bumping into a zombie or survivor.
Increased chance to fail a tall fence climb.
Cannot gain Fitness XP towards level 10.)
UI_trait_unefficientdesc:
You are lazy and slow.
-2 Efficiency
UI_trait_unfitdesc:
Very low endurance, very low endurance regeneration.
(Can become Out of Shape by training Fitness to level 3.
Gained if Fitness is below level 3.)
UI_trait_unluckydesc:
What could go wrong for you, often does.
-10% chance to find rare loot.
+5% chance of failing item repairs.
UI_trait_unluckydsc: What could go wrong for you, often does.
UI_trait_unwaveringdesc:
Damage penalty from being low on endurance, being tired or in pain is greatly reduced.
Penalty for movement speed from injuries is decreased.
You recover from zombie attacks twice as fast.
UI_trait_usedtocorpsesdesc:
Decaying corpses do not cause nausea.
(If do not have nausea at the moment. Does not affect zombification sickness.)
UI_trait_vagabonddesc:
You know how to survive on the streets.
You know that there is always something to eat where people would never look, namely the trash.
You tend to find more food items in garbage containers.
Chance affected by luck.
+1 Scavenging if Scavenging Skill mod enabled
UI_trait_veryunderweightDesc2:
Very low combat effectiveness, very low endurance and prone to injury.
Starts with 60 weight and Fast Metabolism trait.
UI_trait_veryunderweightdesc:
Very low strength, very low endurance and prone to injury.
(Starting weight is 60.
Replaced by Emaciated if weight goes below 50.
Replaced by Underweight if weight goes above 65.
-40% melee damage.
+20% chance to trip while run/sprint vaulting a low fence or getting attacked by lunging zombies.
Increased chance of falling when bumping into a zombie or survivor.
Greatly increased chance to fail a tall fence climb.
-30% endurance regeneration.
+20% fall damage and slightly increased chance of fracture/deep wound from falling.
Cannot gain Fitness XP above level 6.)
UI_trait_vulturedesc: You know where to look for the good stuff.
UI_trait_weakbackdesc:
Reduces carry weight.
(Minus 1-3 carry weight depending on Strength level.)
UI_trait_weakdesc:
Less knockback from melee weapons. Decreased carrying weight.
(-40% melee damage.
Can become Feeble by training Strength to level 2.
Gained if Strength goes below level 2.)
UI_trait_weathersensitivedesc: May experience headaches when the weather changes and when it rains/snows.
UI_trait_wildsmandesc:
You are trained to live off the land.
You have knowledge of basic stick trap recipes as well as the ability to craft a basic fishing rod.
UI_trait_woodaxemybeloveddesc:
Gain additional Axe experience when chopping trees.
Can use Wood Axe more effectively in combat.
(Wood Axe swings cost less endurance.)
